MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. MICHELLE J. AN, Esq. of Yoka/Smith LLP (Tel: 213-427-2300) for defendant Fitness International, LLC;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT FITNESS INTERNATIONAL, LLC's Motion For An Order Deeming Admitted Truth Of Facts In Request For Admissions, Set One.

Defendant stipulates to the matter being decided by the pro tem judge. The pro tem judge and counsel for defendant (both appearing remotely) authorize the clerk to sign the formal stipulation form on their behalf.

Matter not contested/argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.
